items.description:
Rail items rendered in the right column.
Set via JS property: `el.items = [...]`. Replace the array reference to update.

itemsJson.description: JSON fallback for `items` — useful when framework bindings don't propagate arrays.

open.description: When false, only the icon rail is shown.

events.name: dsChromeTransitionStart
events.description: Bubbling lifecycle — `ds-bar-nav` defers overflow checks during drawer motion.

events.name: dsToolChange
events.description: Emitted when a rail button is toggled. Detail = { id, selected }.

methods.name: activateTool
methods.description: Toggle any rail tool open/closed — shell shortcuts K/A/S/M/N call this.

methods.name: closeDrawer
methods.description: Close the tools drawer when open — used by shell keyboard shortcuts.

consumption.complexPropertyNote: Assign these non-primitive values as JavaScript properties: items.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.
